title: Config Export Audit Event
description: Kafka audit event emitted on every tenant functional config export (successful, partial, or failed). Topic: console.config.export.completed (90-day retention).

correlation_id.description: Unique identifier for this export request; matches the correlation_id in the export artifact

tenant_id.description: Identifier of the tenant whose configuration was exported

actor_id.description: Identity of the actor who initiated the export (user email, service account name)

domains_requested.description: Domain keys requested in the export. Empty array means all available domains were requested.

domains_exported.description: Domain keys successfully exported (status ok or empty)

domains_failed.description: Domain keys where the collector returned an error

domains_not_available.description: Domain keys marked as not_available due to deployment profile configuration

result_status.description: ok: all requested domains exported; partial: at least one failed; failed: all requested domains failed

artifact_bytes.description: Size in bytes of the returned export artifact. null if export failed before producing an artifact.

format_version.description: Format version of the export artifact

export_started_at.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp when the export was initiated

export_ended_at.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp when the export completed (or failed)

emitted_at.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp when this Kafka event was emitted
